content.thinking:
The files already exist and look correct. Let me verify them against the acceptance criteria:

AC1: income < 10,000 → tax = 0 ✓ (line 28-30: `if (income < 10_000) return 0`)
AC2: income = 10,000 → tax = income * 0.10 ✓ (line 32: `if (income <= 50_000) return income * 0.10`)
AC3: income 10,001–50,000 → tax = income * 0.10 ✓


AC4: income = 50,000 → tax = income * 0.10 ✓ (still <= 50_000)
AC5: income 50,001–150,000 → tax = income * 0.25 ✓ (line 36: `if (income <= 150_000) return income * 0.25`)
AC6: income > 150,000 → tax = income * 0.40 ✓ (line 40: `return income * 0.40`)
AC7: income = 150,000 → tax = income * 0.25 ✓ (still <= 150_000)
AC8: income ≤ 0 → throw TaxError with code INVALID_

INCOME ✓ (line 21-26)

The implementation looks solid across all test cases. Now I'll run the tests to confirm everything passes.
